title: Oldschool Netherite
description: Smelt Netherite directly from Ancient Debris. Instead of using the Smithing Table, craft Netherite Equipment like any other Equipment.
body:
![Image Displaying the Logo of Oldschool Netherite Data Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/947a9b99929f81f149803c652fb17a9b111b0a70.png)


**Ancient Debris** and **Netherite Scrap** now smelt directly into **Netherite Ingots**. ![An Image displaying how to smelt Netherite Ingots directly from Ancient Debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rtAWsPEI/images/7e2838f31dd71e552b7c71ad0d18909166c08ca8.png) You can craft **Netherite Armor** and **Tools** like Iron, Gold and Diamond Equipment. ![Netherite Chestplate Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cec566b454a617748665ecd9d32ded9c3dd7edb.png) Upgrading in the Smithing Table does not work anymore. You can recycle Netherite Upgrade Templates into Diamonds. ![Image showing Recycling Process of Netherite Upgrade Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/764a8affe4cbfe3d58792e38116b7930b4b0de1b.png) ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚙️ Compatibility Versions < 1.3b: Might result in unexpected behavior when mixed with other Datapacks that modify Bastion Remnant loot, but only an insanely small amount of Datapacks acutally does this! [To fix, delete the "data/minecraft/loot_tables" folder inside this data pack.] ## ❗Issues & Suggestions Please report issues immediately on [my Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H).
